violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food are being stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Bags of really to heat soup were being thawed in standing water in the prep sink. These should be placed in a tub and water should be flowing to remove any debris.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. A container of potatoes in the front cold holding cabinets display case was dated 3/10. This exceeds the 10 days allowed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the food storage rack in the walk in cooler needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile by the theee compartment sink.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. The back door by the mop sink has a large gap under the door. This gap needs to be sealed.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
